articles.title: 2 Dorchester women charged in alleged human trafficking scheme
articles.description:
The victim, who was homeless at the time she was targeted, was held against her will and forced to engage in sexual acts, prosecutors say.

The post 2 Dorchester women charged in alleged human trafficking scheme appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Two Dorchester women charged with human trafficking involving a homeless victim.
Victim was allegedly held against her will and forced into sexual acts.
Case highlights ongoing concerns about human trafficking in Boston neighborhoods.

articles.title: ‘Brilliant, unique soul’: Mother remembers Fall River teen who drowned in pond
articles.description:
“The silence he leaves behind is deafening," Kailyn Lord wrote about her son in a GoFundMe description.

The post ‘Brilliant, unique soul’: Mother remembers Fall River teen who drowned in pond appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kailyn Lord remembers her son, a Fall River teen, who tragically drowned in a pond.
The GoFundMe for the family highlights the profound loss felt by the community.
Local residents are mourning the death, emphasizing the need for pond safety awareness.

articles.title: House passes bill to ‘ditch the switch’ and make daylight saving time permanent
articles.description:
The Senate would also have to pass the bill before it could be signed into law, but it’s unclear if it will do so.

The post House passes bill to ‘ditch the switch’ and make daylight saving time permanent appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: House passes bill to make daylight saving time permanent on July 14, 2026.
Senate approval is needed for the bill to become law.
Permanent daylight saving time could affect Boston's evening daylight and energy usage.

articles.title: Jennifer Garner posts throwback video of karaoke night at Nantucket restaurant
articles.description:
The video shows the actress dancing with local Nantucket Ghost Walk guide Bill Jamieson.

The post Jennifer Garner posts throwback video of karaoke night at Nantucket restaurant appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jennifer Garner shares a nostalgic karaoke video from Nantucket restaurant.
The video features local guide Bill Jamieson dancing with Garner.
The post highlights Nantucket's vibrant local culture, attracting Boston residents.
